name: Soufle Spanaki (Spinach Souffle)
recipeInstructions:
1. Clean and wash the spinach. Select only the tender leaves and chop them to measure 1 cup. Season lightly with salt and pepper, and place in a strainer.
2. Let drain for 1 hour.
3. In a small pot, melt butter over medium heat.
4. Gradually add flour, stirring constantly until a smooth paste is formed.
5. Add the hot milk while whisking continuously to create a thick sauce. Season with a little salt and pepper.
6. Remove from heat and stir in the chopped spinach and scallions.
7. Beat the egg yolks until very thick.
8. Beat the egg whites until stiff peaks form.
9. Gently fold the beaten yolks into the spinach mixture, then carefully fold in the egg whites to maintain airiness.
10. Pour the batter into a greased mold.
11. Bake immediately in a preheated 350°F (175°C) oven for about 30 minutes.
12. Serve immediately.
